title: New Accounts Clerks
description: Interview persons desiring to open accounts in financial institutions. Explain account services available to prospective customers and assist them in preparing applications.

tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile information about new accounts, enter account information into computers, and file related forms or other documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect and record customer deposits and fees and issue receipts, using computers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Inform customers of procedures for applying for services, such as ATM cards, direct deposit of checks, and certificates of deposit.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Answer customers' questions and explain available services, such as deposit accounts, bonds, and securities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview customers to obtain information needed for opening accounts or renting safe-deposit boxes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Refer customers to appropriate bank personnel to meet their financial needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate and correct errors upon customers' request, according to customer and bank records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Issue initial and replacement safe-deposit keys to customers, and admit customers to vaults.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain credit records from reporting agencies.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Schedule repairs for locks on safe-deposit boxes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform foreign currency transactions and sell traveler's checks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Duplicate records for distribution to branch offices.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
